description_long: This research institute is a sprawling, modern complex surrounded by a perimeter of dense trees and greenery, providing both privacy and a natural aesthetic. The building features multiple interconnected rectangular structures with flat, green roofs, some of which appear to be covered with vegetation, suggesting eco-friendly design elements. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessed by a wide driveway and flanked by landscaped areas with palm trees and manicured shrubs. The central courtyard includes open spaces, pathways, and a swimming pool, creating a campus-like atmosphere ideal for collaborative research and relaxation. Large windows and open terraces are visible, maximizing natural light and outdoor connectivity. The overall layout is low-rise and horizontally expansive, with a focus on accessibility and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, low-rise research institute complex with green roofs, landscaped courtyards, and a tree-lined perimeter, featuring interconnected rectangular buildings and open communal spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, landscaped front yard, and the full extent of the tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and the arrangement of the buildings with visible green roofs and open courtyards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, terraces, and the back garden area, with the building's horizontal layout clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the garage, side landscaping, and the interconnected nature of the building wings.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is wide and accessible, set back from the street with a broad driveway leading to it. It features a flat canopy roof, large glass doors, and is flanked by landscaped planters and palm trees. The entrance is at ground level, with no visible steps, suggesting wheelchair accessibility. Decorative elements include modern lighting and minimalistic design.
